memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Wyndham
memoryArtifacts.description:
Married 1467

Sir John Wyndham of Crownthorpe and Felbrigg, son of John Wyndham and Margaret Clifton, was born circa 1451.22

Sir John Wyndham of Crownthorpe and Felbrigg married first, Margaret Howar …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Wyndham Biography
memoryArtifacts.description:
Knight of Crownthorpe, Banningham, Colby, Felbrigg, and Ingworth, Norfolk.

Found guilty of treason for aiding Edmund de la Pole, Earl of Suffolk, and beheaded on Tower Hill.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wyndham於1443年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可洛東普時，他的父親Sir John Wyndham33歲，母親Margery Clifton31歲。他於大約1466年與Lady Margaret Howard在英國諾福爾可可洛東普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年5月16日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可洛東普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wyndham于1443年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可可洛東普时，他的父亲Sir John Wyndham33岁，母亲Margery Clifton31岁。他于大约1466年与Lady Margaret Howard在英国諾福爾可可洛東普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年5月16日在英国英格兰倫敦享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可可洛東普。

nameMeanings.name: Wyndham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Windham  .

variants.name: Windham
meanings: English: habitational name usually from the Norfolk placename Wymondham, which is locally pronounced /wɪndəm/. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’. By various marriages in the 16th century the Wyndham family of Felbrigg Hall, Norfolk, acquired estates in North Yorkshire and Somerset, for which reason the manor of Orchard in the parish of Watchet, came to be known as Orchard Wyndham in the early 17th century. Later descendants became earls of Egremont, whose estates included Petworth in Sussex. This and other marital acquistions probably explain the post-medieval presence of the surname in Somerset, Devon, Dorset, Wiltshire, Gloucestershire, northern England, and perhaps also (from the late 17th century) in Sussex and Kent. In 1741 Percy Wyndham of the Orchard family inherited the earldom of Thomond, in Ireland, which may account for the currency of the name in Connaght (see 4 below).

English: habitational name perhaps occasionally from Wymondham in Leicestershire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund (genitive Wīgmundes) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.
English: habitational name from Wyndham in Shermanbury (Sussex). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Winda + Old English hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wyndham was born in 1443, in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Wyndham, was 33 and his mother, Margery Clifton, was 31. He married Lady Margaret Howard about 1466, in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 16 May 1502, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Battle of Stoke: Battle, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wyndham est né en 1443, à Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wyndham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Clifton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Howard environ 1466, à Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1502, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wyndham 1443 in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wyndham 33 und seine Mutter Margery Clifton 31. Er hat um 1466 in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England Lady Margaret Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Mai 1502 im Alter von 59 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wyndham è nato il nel 1443 nel Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Wyndham, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margery Clifton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Howard circa 1466, nel Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 maggio 1502, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wyndhamが1443年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルククロウンソルペで生まれた時，父Sir John Wyndhamは33歳，母Margery Cliftonは31歳であった。約1466年にイギリスノーフォルククロウンソルペでLady Margaret Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年5月16日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルククロウンソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wyndham(이)가 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크로운소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wyndham(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Clifton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1466년 영국 노르폴크 크로운소에서 Lady Margaret Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 5월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크로운소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wyndham nasceu em 1443, em Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Wyndham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Clifton, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Howard aproximadamente 1466, em Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1502, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wyndham родился в 1443 г. в местности кроунтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Wyndham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Clifton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Howard около 1466 г. в местности кроунтаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 16 мая 1502 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности кроунтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wyndham nació en 1443, en Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Wyndham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Clifton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Howard aproximadamente 1466, en Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1502, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
